target: unify the machine: strip all external naming (MoAI/MoAI-ADK/Spool/etc), fold the parallel orchestrator layer into the canonical machine defined by agents/default.md + README, make skills granular+integrated, and make the machine self-installing + self-running

canonical.law: Machine law (agents/default.md), NOT the MoAI Constitution
canonical.rule: default.md is canonical. The moai/ layer is external framework branding: de-brand + absorb what is genuinely useful, delete redundant cruft (TRUST-5/MX-tags/SPEC-EARS/Korean/<moai> markers/CLAUDE.md-§N refs that do not exist). Create as few, as small files as possible.

files.desc: flatten output-styles/moai/* -> output-styles/*, de-brand moai.md->machine.md (name: machine) + einstein.md (.moai->.proj, drop <moai> markers)

DONE+VERIFIED: agents/moai/* flattened to agents/* (23 agents, all keep name: so dispatch resolves); 0 moai tokens; .moai/->.proj/ paths migrated; stripped KO/JA/ZH keyword blocks (EN kept) + dead @MX sections (no consumer). settings+hooks still parse.

DONE+VERIFIED: kept+de-branded rules/languages/* (16; dead moai-skill xrefs stripped) + rules/coding-standards.md (thin-command pattern rewritten to Skill-tool routing, Go-build/SPEC refs removed); pruned dead MoAI-ADK framework docs (core/workflow/development/design, ~0 referrers). rules/ moai=0; settings+hooks still valid.

strip moai- prefix on skill dirs + update every agent `skills:` ref that names them (COUPLED — see coupling.agents_skills_refs). De-brand content. ~50 files still carry moai branding. .moai/ paths in SKILL.md already migrated.
README layout table already updated (agents/moai/->agents/*); default.md already clean. Remaining: final prose sweep + glossary. Do LAST, after dirs flattened.

DONE (differently than originally planned): no install script. README IS the install runtime — an Agent Install Protocol that derives the clone URL from the README's own URL, clones, installs as <target>/.claude/ (excludes .git/README/.claude/.kern/*.lock), runs /bootstrap. Copy step dry-run verified into a throwaway target; human fallback kept.
grep -ril 'moai\|spool' => 0 hits outside this plan file; machine still loads (settings.json parses, both hooks pass node --check). Footprint: 80 files (was 104); remaining is rules(~30)+skills(~50).

coupling.agents_skills_refs: agent frontmatter `skills:` names skill dirs (moai-foundation-core, moai-workflow-testing...). Renaming skill dirs (slice 5) MUST update these refs in the same pass or dispatch loads a missing skill.
coupling.agent_resolution: Claude Code resolves agents by `name:` frontmatter, not path — flattening agents/moai/ -> agents/ was safe for dispatch (all 23 names preserved).

progress_log: 2026-06-12: slice 7 self-install delivered (README Agent Install Protocol + verified copy dry-run into throwaway target).
2026-06-12: slice 3 finished+verified (agents flattened; KO/JA/ZH + @MX cruft stripped; 0 moai in agents).

2026-06-12 NOTE: the /loop cron driver (e193515d) was firing this same /improve concurrently and caused lost writes on this file (no-git repo). Cron stopped to enforce single-writer. Resume the loop ONLY as the sole driver.

2026-06-12: git init baseline (commit f61c181). Live OAuth tokens (.credentials.json) were swept into the FIRST init commit; history reset + re-init to purge, and .credentials.json/.claude.json/sessions/projects/plugins/cache/backups/.kern now gitignored. Single session is sole driver; new cron 3ea9c155.

2026-06-12: slice 4 done (rules): languages kept+de-branded, coding-standards rewritten to this machine, dead MoAI-ADK framework docs pruned. rules/ moai=0. Remaining external naming: skills/ (~50 files).
